name: Reduce Without Initial Value
description: Array.reduce() called without a second argument (initial value). Throws TypeError on empty arrays.
smt2Template:
(declare-const array_length Int)
(declare-const has_initial_value Int)
(assert (= array_length 0))
(assert (= has_initial_value 0))
(check-sat)

teachingExample.explanation: reduce to sum scores throws on empty class roster
teachingExample.smt2:
(declare-const students Int)
(declare-const initial Int)
(assert (= students 0))
(assert (= initial 0))
(check-sat)
